title: Database Schema & Core Infrastructure Setup
description: Design and implement the complete database schema for PhotoBuddy including all tables, relationships, indexes, and Row Level Security policies. This includes: users table (profile data, subscription tier, settings), photos table (url, metadata, EXIF data, AI-generated tags, user_id), follows table (follower_id, following_id), likes table (user_id, photo_id), comments table (user_id, photo_id, content), and subscriptions table (user_id, plan, status, dates). Configure Supabase Storage bucket for photo uploads with appropriate access policies. Out of scope: Authentication UI, application code that uses these tables.
